metadata.rulesText:
Whenever City of Brass becomes tapped, it deals 1 damage to you.
T: Add one mana of any color to your mana pool.
metadata.flavorText:
"Enter this palace-gate and ask the news
Of greatness fallen into dust and clay."
—The Arabian Nights, trans. Burton

metadata.rulesText: G, T, Sacrifice Elvish Lyrist: Destroy target enchantment.
metadata.flavorText:

—Percy Bysshe Shelley,
"Ode to the West Wind"

metadata.rulesText: Sacrifice Sakura-Tribe Elder: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle your library.
metadata.flavorText: There were no tombstones in orochi territory. Slain warriors were buried with a tree sapling, so they would become part of the forest after death.
